item.title: Sophos named a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Email Security
item.description: Sophos’ first ever recognition as a Customers’ Choice for Email Security.

item.title: Sophos Firewall v22 MR2 is now available
item.description: AI app control, PQC detection, enhanced Chromebook support, and more.

item.title: Sophos Protected Browser Extension: Protection and visibility without changing browsers
item.description: The Sophos Protected Browser Extension brings policy enforcement, data protection, GenAI visibility, and web security controls to existing Chromium-based browsers on Windows and Mac.

item.title: SonicWall SMA1000 vulnerabilities in active exploitation
The stack had a good run. Defense systems are the future.
item.description: Introducing Sophos Fusion, the industry’s most complete AI-Native Cybersecurity Defense System.

item.title: The State of Ransomware 2026: Payments are dropping but encryption is climbing
item.description: Insights from 2,158 IT and cybersecurity leaders across 17 countries whose organizations were hit by ransomware in the past year.

item.title: In code we trust? Why the most trusted software receives the least scrutiny.
item.description: Recent CVEs across GitHub, Anthropic, Google, dbt, and MISP expose a simple truth: the most trusted code is often the least questioned. As organizations connect AI agents to production systems, those overlooked assumptions can become powerful new attack paths.

item.title: Sophos joins Anthropic's Project Glasswing
item.description: As a Project Glasswing member, Sophos gains access to Claude Mythos 5, an advanced frontier model not currently available to the public, to find and fix software vulnerabilities before AI-driven attackers can exploit them.

item.title: Sophos ZTNA unlocks SaaS app control and so much more
item.description: Sophos ZTNA customers now get Sophos Protected Browser as part of Sophos Workspace Protection, extending Zero Trust controls to SaaS and web apps while improving secure RDP and SSH access.
